prompt:
i've got like 80 files all dumped in one directory with zero organization. need you to sort them into a clean folder structure

the files are a mix of:
- photos (jpg, png) with dates in the filenames
- documents (pdf, docx, txt) from different projects
- spreadsheets (xlsx, csv) with financial/reporting stuff
- code files (js, ts, py) from various projects
- misc stuff (zip archives, config files, logs)

here's what to do:
1. list everything in the directory first so you can see what you're working with
2. look at the filenames and figure out categories
3. create a folder structure that makes sense - maybe by file type (photos/, documents/, spreadsheets/, code/, archives/) and then by project or date within each
4. move every single file into the right folder using mv
5. when you're done, create a MANIFEST.md explaining what you did and the final structure

don't leave anything in the root directory except MANIFEST.md. every file needs to be in a subfolder

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it

args.content:
# Manifest

## Summary of changes
- Organized all files into category folders by type (photos, documents, spreadsheets, code, configs, logs, archives).
- Further grouped items by date, project, or purpose (e.g., photos by year, documents by project, finance spreadsheets).
- Left only this `MANIFEST.md` in the root directory.

## Final structure
```
archives/
  backup_2024-03-01.zip
  backup_2024-06-15.zip
  legacy_code_archive.zip
code/
  js/
    index.js
    lambda_handler.js
  py/
    cron_cleanup.py
    data_pipeline.py
    scraper.py
    test_utils.py
    train_model.py
  sh/
    deploy.sh
    setup_script.sh
  ts/
    api_handler.ts

    database.ts
    graphql_schema.ts
    hooks_useAuth.ts
    migrate_db.ts
    utils.ts
    validate_schema.ts
  tsx/
    components_Button.tsx
    react_dashboard.tsx
configs/
  .env.example
  .eslintrc.json
  credentials_template.yaml
  docker-compose.yml
  Makefile
  nginx.conf
  package_old.json
  tsconfig.prod.json
  webpack.config.js
documents/
  design/
    style_guide_v3.pdf
  hr/
    onboarding_checklist.docx
  legal/
    nda_signed_clientx.pdf
  notes/
    api_documentation_draft.txt
    random_notes.txt
    TODO.txt
  personal/
    cover_letter_techcorp.pdf
    old_resume_2023.pdf
  projects/
    project_alpha/
      project_alpha_final_report.pdf
      project_alpha_proposal.pdf
      notes/
        meeting_notes_project_alpha_feb2024.txt
        meeting_notes_project_alpha_jan2024.txt
    project_beta/
      project_beta_requirements.docx
      project_beta_timeline.pdf
      notes/
        meeting_notes_project_beta_mar2024.txt
  research/
    user_research_findings.txt
  strategy/
    product_roadmap_2024.pdf
    quarterly_okrs_q2_2024.docx
logs/
  application_debug.log
  error_log_2024-05.log
  server_access.log
photos/
  2023/
    IMG_20230918_concert.jpg
    IMG_20231014_hiking_trail.jpg
    IMG_20231225_christmas_tree.jpg
  2024/
    IMG_20240315_vacation_beach.jpg
    IMG_20240316_vacation_sunset.jpg
    IMG_20240401_family_dinner.jpg
    IMG_20240520_office_setup.jpg
    team_photo_offsite_2024.jpg
    screenshots/
      screenshot_2024-01-22_dashboard.png
      screenshot_2024-06-12.png
      screenshot_2024-07-03_bug_report.png
  assets/
    banner_ad_1200x628.png
    logo_draft_final.png
    product_mockup_v2.png
  undated/
    profile_photo_linkedin.jpg
    whiteboard_brainstorm_session.jpg
spreadsheets/
  analytics/
    customer_feedback_2024.xlsx
  finance/
    budget_2024_final_FINAL_v3.xlsx
    expense_report_q1_2024.xlsx
    marketing_spend_by_channel.xlsx
    Q1_2024_revenue_report.xlsx
    Q2_2024_revenue_report.xlsx
    Q3_2024_revenue_report.xlsx
    Q4_2023_revenue_report.xlsx
  hr/
    employee_directory.csv
  operations/
    inventory_tracker.xlsx
  projects/
    project_alpha/
      project_alpha_burndown.csv
  sales/
    sales_leads_june2024.csv
```
